{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220544196D77E6DB885C1EDD12E5"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7456027860237828889","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"《末世：废土黎明》宛如一部震撼心灵的末日影像，开篇便将读者狠狠掷入那如深渊般绝望的废土世界。墨色的夜空下，狂风裹挟着砂砾抽打在残垣断壁之上，废墟间弥漫的腐朽气息令人窒息，主角团队就在这绝境中踏出沉重且坚定的求生步伐，每一处艰难困境都被雕琢得丝丝入扣，让人感同身受。
书中角色跃然纸上，叶辰仿若沉稳的领航巨擘，在惊涛骇浪中指引方向；韩拓即便负伤，亦如坚毅的先锋，为团队开辟血路；艾琳恰似不屈的巾帼战神，眼神中燃烧的斗志从未熄灭。他们彼此支撑，凝聚成一股无坚不摧的力量，轻易牵动读者的心弦。
情节更是一场惊心动魄的冒险盛宴，伏击的惊险、突袭的迅猛，战斗场景仿若烈火与硝烟交织的战场，火爆刺激。而关键箱子的意外发现、废弃工厂绝境突围等转折，如同峰回路转的山路，时刻揪着读者的心。
这部作品绝非简单的末世闯荡，它借幕后黑手的惊天阴谋，深挖人性的复杂、权力的诱惑与自由的珍贵。主角团宛如暗夜中的璀璨灯塔，以守护人类未来为己任，不惜代价冲锋陷阵。《末世：废土黎明》无疑是一本值得反复研读、沉浸品味的末世经典佳作，每一页都写满了绝望与希望的博弈，引领读者探索末世废土之下那炽热的生命力量。","text_exts":[{"e":357,"s":353,"text":"幕后黑手","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B9%95%E5%90%8E%E9%BB%91%E6%89%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741294591EDD12E5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227456027860237828889%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227450687125940358206%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B9%95%E5%90%8E%E9%BB%91%E6%89%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735997504,"group_id":"7450687125940358206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4vcpalh190Bb8CSU8CfM85LA7PTASmh7g9QqVlzZKkF","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4356710994814058","user_name":"喜欢告天鸟的何娉婷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4356710994814058","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7450687125940358206","book_info":{"abstract":"末世爆发后的世界，充满变异生物、资源匮乏、人类社会秩序崩塌。病毒的起源与背后隐藏的阴谋成为主线之一，幸存者们在废土上艰难求生，面对不仅仅是变异生物，还有人类之间的竞争与背叛。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1c137d4fcdbbacea6139524fa1f8ba1b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"喜欢告天鸟的何娉婷","author_id":"","book_id":"7450687125940358206","book_name":"末世：废土黎明","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":869,"name":"废土","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869&name=废土&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7450692514996027966","read_count":"129","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1587933"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"385","tags":"科幻末世,末世,求生,囤物资,末日求生,废土","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o1c137d4fcdbbacea6139524fa1f8ba1b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779313459&x-signature=w5qjSWatwtMa1iM%2FdGqUIWdeH8U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4356710994814058","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220544196D77E6DB885C1EDD12E5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"
